steps.action: Set the browser viewport to 375x812 and open #graph-macro-thesis, #graph-hft-edge, #graph-llm-product, and #graph-truth-perp-flywheel in the shared local app.
steps.expected: Each focused surface renders at 375px width without horizontal overflow.
steps.observed: Macro Thesis, HFT Edge, LLM Product, and TRUTH-PERP & Flywheel all rendered at 375px with docOverflow=0 and surfaceOverflow=0.

steps.action: Measure the focused-surface back button and related-node controls on each mobile surface and capture screenshots.
steps.expected: The back button and related-node controls are touch-friendly at roughly a 44px hit area while preserving the no-overflow layout.
steps.observed: All four focused surfaces rendered at 375px without horizontal overflow. Each focused-surface back button measured 44x44px, and every related-node control measured 44px tall with widths varying by label.

steps.action: Check browser runtime logs after the mobile rerun.
steps.expected: No console/runtime issues appear while retesting the four surfaces.
steps.observed: No console/runtime issues were captured during the rerun.
